case_title: SANDS SWANSON HELENA V. VS DE SOTO BAIL BONDS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANDS SWANSON HELENA V. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DE SOTO BAIL BONDS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,303.05 FILED BY SANDS SWANSON HELENA V. AS TO DEFENDANT DE SOTO BAIL BONDS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $346.00 FILED BY DE SOTO BAIL BONDS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SANDS SWANSON HELENA V. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DE SOTO BAIL BONDS RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT SANDS SWANSON HELENA V. $346.00 PRINCIPAL, $47.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $393.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DE SOTO BAIL BONDS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-28-1994, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-28-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DE SOTO BAIL BONDS
CONTINUANCE SENT TO JUDGE FOR SIGNATURE WITH $10 FEE.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO PLAINTIFF SANDS SWANSON HELENA V.
